data.title: Add attribution steps to COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md
data.description: Edit plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md (non-executable LLM instruction file). Add two steps: (1) Pre-commit step: 'If attribution.enabled=true in dso-config.conf, run apply-attribution-trailers.sh <commit-msg-file> [<task-id>]. If the script exits non-zero, emit a warning to stderr and continue (non-blocking). SKIP ENTIRELY when attribution.enabled is absent or not true.' (2) Post-commit step: 'After git commit exits 0, if attribution.enabled=true, run apply-attribution-trailers.sh --truncate. If truncation exits non-zero, emit a warning to stderr but do not fail. SKIP ENTIRELY when attribution.enabled is not true.' Both steps must include the explicit skip condition AND failure-handling clause. TDD exemption: Rule 5 of behavioral-testing-standard.md (non-executable LLM instruction file). Test at structural boundary ONLY: check-referential-integrity.sh exits 0. Content-grep assertions PROHIBITED. AC: (1) prose has skip condition; (2) prose has failure-handling clause; (3) bash plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh plugins/dso/docs/workflows/COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md exits 0.
